examples: Objective To modify the method of gavage administration in guinea pigs.
Objective To explore the feature and effects of nursing on gavage in neonate.
The production of the pâté involves the force-feeding of ducks or geese, known in French as gavage, to create fatty livers.
The force-feeding process, called gavage, causes the animals liver to expand up to 10 times its size.
What do they think when they see that through the bus windows on their way to the next gavage of geese?
